commands.name: new

options.name: --proj
options.description:
Project name (also used as default output
folder).

options.name: --server
options.description:
Use the Blazor Server (global interactivity)
template.

commands.description: Creates a new Blazor project from a template.

commands.name: repair
commands.description:
Re-add Shared component with overwrite. Use if setup was broken
or incomplete.

commands.name: component
commands.description:
Component management. Shared and its dependencies are added 
automatically.

commands.name: add

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
Overwrite if component already exists (no
prompt).

arguments.name: name
arguments.description:
The name of the component to add. (input, textarea, 
checkbox, etc.) Omit when using --all.

commands.description:
Adds a component to a project. Runs first-time setup 
automatically if needed.

commands.name: info

arguments.name: name
arguments.description:
The name of the component. (input, textarea, checkbox, 
etc.)

commands.description: Displays details related to a component.
